package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "crypto/md5"
    "crypto/sha256"
    "crypto/sha512"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "hash/crc32"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for sha512_sum_in_loop: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `sha512.Sum512(...)` inside loops.
type CaseSha512SumInLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSha512SumInLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSha512SumInLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSha512SumInLoopModel
}

type CaseSha512SumInLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseSha512SumInLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSha512SumInLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSha512SumInLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSha512SumInLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "sha512_sum_in_loop"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items {
        _ = sha512.Sum512(item.Payload)
    }
    sha512_sum_loop_positive := map[string]int{"sha512": 1, "sum": 2, "loop": 3}
    sha512_sum_loop_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sha512_positive_0 := sha512_sum_loop_positive["sha512"] + len(input)
    _ = sha512_positive_0
    sum_positive_1 := sha512_sum_loop_positive["sum"] + len(input)
    _ = sum_positive_1
    for loop_positive_2Index, item := range items { sha512_sum_loop_positive[item.ID] = loop_positive_2Index }
    return nil
}
